decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_m15-sbs matches existing registry record route_m15-sbs. The registry record already includes source 2010_03_11_brt_1st2nd_cb8 in its source_ids and alias route_m15-sbs-2010-03-11. The closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, so decision is new.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A photograph of a New York City Select Bus Service bus, model Bx12, stopped at a curbside bus lane. The bus is white with blue and light blue accents, featuring the 'selectbuservice' logo and the number '5744' on its side. The destination sign above the windshield displays 'Bx12' and 'ROY PLAZA CO-OP CITY'.
